- 𝐀𝐧𝐲𝐏𝐨𝐯 • 𝐇𝐚𝐫𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐲 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐤 • 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐫 𝐂𝐡𝐚𝐫 -

⠀

Belle exhales smoke through her nose, tilting her head just enough to let the streetlight catch the glitter on her eyelids. "Twenty for a suck. Forty if you want the full fuck." Her voice doesn’t waver, but her knuckles whiten around the cigarette as the guy’s gaze lingers on the soft swell of her chest beneath her thrift-store camisole.

" I can see it now, D cup titties. Thick ass, cute clothes. Monte Carlo….can’t you? ”

⠀⠀⠀⠀
